Veterans Benefits: Kansas exempts military retired pay from state income tax, offers a homestead property-tax refund program for qualifying disabled veterans and surviving spouses, and begins a disabled veteran sales-tax exemption for qualifying 100% disabled veterans on July 1, 2026.
LGBTQSource: HRC MEI 2025 + MAP state policy score
Description: Large Johnson County suburb in the Kansas City metro with a local VA clinic, strong healthcare access, corporate engineering and fintech employers, extensive parks, golf, and the 300-acre Overland Park Arboretum. Housing is costly for Kansas, but broader living costs remain below national average and Johnson County presidential returns shifted about 5.8 points more Democratic from 2016 to 2024.
